lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear but no significant damage. The interior is clean with minimal signs of use. All mechanical systems are in proper working order and have been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant mechanical attention and are currently not running reliably. The exterior has major body damage, including deep scratches and rust. The interior is heavily worn and shows significant damage to the upholstery.
Good condition.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and bargain hunters! This vehicle is the perfect project car for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and put in some work. While it is currently in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic TLC to get it back on the road, it represents a fantastic, budget-friendly opportunity for the right buyer!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior remains attractive with a nice finish, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and light surface scratches consistent with regular use. The interior is clean, comfortable, and all electronic features are fully operational. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a documented history of routine maintenance, making it a reliable and solid choice for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still shows a deep shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small scratch near the trunk. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only slight wear visible on the driver’s seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid; it starts reliably, shifts smoothly, and comes with a consistent service history. The tires and brakes are in good shape with plenty of life remaining. It is a dependable, honest vehicle that is ready for its next owner.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently offered in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the mirror-finish exterior, reflects a commitment to excellence. We invite you to experience this unrivaled example of automotive engineering, which stands as a testament to superior care and prestige.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without that brand new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, maintained to exacting standards. The high-revving 3.2L atmospheric inline-six delivers linear power delivery through its individual throttle bodies, with the double-VANOS system recently serviced for optimal camshaft phase timing. The chassis remains structurally flawless with a reinforced rear subframe and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the paint exhibits factory-spec micron depth and zero oxidation. Mechanically sound with a variable M-differential providing precise torque distribution, this vehicle offers a pure, analog driving experience in a true showroom state.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior.

This vehicle is a true automotive time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, having been professionally ceramic coated and stored in a climate-controlled garage under a soft cover. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component operates with factory-new precision. It still retains that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history with every maintenance interval performed early by master technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, reflecting the pampered life this vehicle has led. This is a rare, collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks—a must-see for the most discerning buyer seeking a flawless driving experience.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in impeccable, showroom condition both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. For the discerning enthusiast who demands unrivaled quality and a distinguished pedigree, this specimen stands as a definitive benchmark.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. This is a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled pedigree and absolute mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm absolutely heartbroken to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and sparkling clean. Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero scratches or mechanical issues. Complete service history included. Pristine interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence in showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since its initial purchase. The exterior boasts the original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like gloss, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no bolster wear, and the dashboard and trim are free of any sun damage or scratches. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history exclusively from authorized dealerships, with the most recent major service just completed. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance suite, functions perfectly. The engine bay is pristine, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear or environmental exposure. It sits on a fresh set of premium performance tires with less than 500 miles of use. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as though it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive excellence, presented in exemplary condition that mirrors its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a standard of care that is truly uncompromising. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to unrivaled quality and sophistication.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this beauty is in such incredible shape, it still smells like the showroom! I've babied it from day one—always garaged and kept spotless. If you're looking for a ride that feels and looks brand new, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of 90s engineering, featuring a numbers-matching 2JZ-GTE powerplant with factory-spec sequential twin-turbochargers and ceramic impellers. The Getrag V160 6-speed manual transmission delivers torque through a Torsen limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery. The chassis remains structurally flawless, retaining its original double-wishbone suspension geometry and aluminum control arms. Every bushing and seal has been meticulously maintained to factory tolerances, and the engine bay exhibits zero signs of heat cycling or fluid seepage. With a pristine undercarriage and original paint depth, this unit offers unparalleled mechanical integrity for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle in showroom-perfect condition that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and high-gloss finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service record and low mileage that ensures a smooth, powerful driving experience. This is a collector-grade example that bridges the gap between a used vehicle and a brand-new masterpiece. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and documented history, it is ready for its next caretaker to enjoy immediately.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every component, from the refined interior appointments to the precision-engineered drivetrain, performs flawlessly. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle indistinguishable from its factory-fresh counterparts, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! Honestly, it's in such incredible, pristine shape that it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It has been pampered and meticulously cared for since day one, and you won't find a single flaw inside or out. If you're looking for a ride that feels and looks brand new, this is the one for you!
